name: Liberty Broadband Corp
summary: General Development of Business Liberty Broadband Corporation (Liberty Broadband, the Company, us, we, or our) is primarily comprised of an equity method investment in Charter. During May 2014, the board of directors of Liberty Media Corporation and its subsidiaries (Liberty) authorized management to pursue a plan to spin-off to its stockholders common stock of a wholly owned subsidiary, Liberty Broadband, and to distribute subscription rights to acquire shares of Liberty Broadbands common stock...
